prompt: I want to start a new Expo app called FoodTracker. It's a meal logging app. Scaffold auth and home features.

assertions.description: Checks latest Expo version before running CLI command (npm view expo version)
Installs zustand, @tanstack/react-query, axios, react-hook-form, and zod
Uses Expo Router (app/_layout.tsx) not React Navigation
Creates src/features/auth/ with components, hooks, screens, store, api subfolders
Creates src/features/home/ with components, hooks, screens, store, api subfolders
All generated files use TypeScript (.tsx / .ts extensions)
